message:
Running command: # All available librelane binaries are v2.4.6. The run was made with 3.0.2 in a previous session.
# The session environment changed (librelane was downgraded from 3.0.2 to 2.4.6).
# 
# REAL FUNDAMENTAL ISSUE: The run directory was created by librelane 3.0.2 
# but we now only have 2.4.6. The step names and config structure differ.
#
# BEST PATH FORWARD: Start a completely fresh run with librelane 2.4.6.
# This means re-running synthesis + all PnR steps from scratch.
# But this is the CLEAN approach that will actually work.
#
# Let's check if librelane 2.4.6 has the same flow steps and behavior.
# What's the step count in a 2.4.6 run vs the 3.0.2 run?
# The pnr_dryrun completed successfully with 2.4.6 - 78 steps.
# Our pnr_run_v2 (3.0.2) had ~50 steps before getting to RepairDesignPostGPL.
# 
# Start fresh run with pnr_run_v4 and v2.4.6:

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v4.pid
echo "PnR v4 started: PID $PNR_PID"
sleep 30
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended - check log"
tail -6 /tmp/pnr_v4.log

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# All available librelane binaries are v2.4.6. The run was made with 3.0.2 in a previous session.
# The session environment changed (librelane was downgraded from 3.0.2 to 2.4.6).
# 
# REAL FUNDAMENTAL ISSUE: The run directory was created by librelane 3.0.2 
# but we now only have 2.4.6. The step names and config structure differ.
#
# BEST PATH FORWARD: Start a completely fresh run with librelane 2.4.6.
# This means re-running synthesis + all PnR steps from scratch.
# But this is the CLEAN approach that will actually work.
#
# Let's check if librelane 2.4.6 has the same flow steps and behavior.
# What's the step count in a 2.4.6 run vs the 3.0.2 run?
# The pnr_dryrun completed successfully with 2.4.6 - 78 steps.
# Our pnr_run_v2 (3.0.2) had ~50 steps before getting to RepairDesignPostGPL.
# 
# Start fresh run with pnr_run_v4 and v2.4.6:

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_v4.pid
echo "PnR v4 started: PID $PNR_PID"
sleep 30
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended - check log"
tail -6 /tmp/pnr_v4.log
